subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant of God! Today the highest aspiration and most noble of deeds is that which acts as a magnet for the bestowals of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بایات الله امروز اعظم آمال و اشرف اعمال که مغناطیس مواهب ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
